subcodes.first_line: Thy remembrance is mentioned before the Throne and thy call is heard. God willing, through the tender mercies of the All-Merciful and the divine outpourings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکرت لدی العرش مذکور و ندایت مسموع انشاء الله از عنایت رحمانیه و فیوضات الهیه
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat], @love of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
